query: Microsoft most recent annual revenue fiscal 2025 annual report revenue
answer: Microsoft's fiscal 2025 annual revenue was $281.7 billion, a 15% increase from the previous year. Azure revenue surpassed $75 billion for the first time, growing 34%. The company's operating income rose 17% to $128.5 billion.
